title: hierourgeo #2418
definition:
1) to minister in the manner of a priest, minister in priestly service
    1a) of those who defend the sanctity of the law by undergoing a
        violent death
    1b) of the preaching of the gospel
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to minister in the manner of a priest, minister in priestly service
    1a) of those who defend the sanctity of the law by undergoing a
        violent death
    1b) of the preaching of the gospel

    NASB:  to perform sacred rites:
